title: Sean Penn: The Outsider
original_title: Sean Penn, l'enfant terrible de l'Amérique
overview: Sean Penn is almost a living legend. His filmography paints a picture of an 'other America': the lower class, the oppressed and the outsiders. Whether as an actor or director, he turns all the great myths upside down.
